candidate_mechanism: osmotic gradient pulling weight magnitude out of null-space components, preserving task subspace

per_result_scores.title: Ham — Wikipedia
per_result_scores.rationale: Source-domain reference (salt cure / osmotic dehydration). No LLM/null-space/weight content.

per_result_scores.title: GaLore: Gradient Low-Rank Projection
per_result_scores.rationale: Projects gradient onto low-rank subspace for memory-efficient training; related concept of subspace projection but no null-space weight-magnitude pull. Calibration band 0.6-0.7.

per_result_scores.title: Common Null Space of Gradients for CL
per_result_scores.rationale: Null-space projection of gradients for continual learning; preserves prior-task subspace. Strong functional overlap with preserving task subspace, though gradient-projection rather than weight-magnitude osmotic pull. Calibration band 0.75-0.85.

per_result_scores.title: GradMAP Layer Pruning + Projection Compensation
per_result_scores.rationale: Global gradient-magnitude metric for layer pruning with projection compensation; shares magnitude-driven pruning concept but no null-space subspace target. kw>=2 triggers hit. Calibration band 0.5-0.6.

per_result_scores.title: LoRA-Null: Null-Space-Aware LoRA Initialization
per_result_scores.rationale: Initializes LoRA adapters in null-space of representative activations; preserves task subspace by construction. Different operation (init vs pull) but same null-space + task-subspace structure. Calibration band 0.7-0.8.

per_result_scores.title: Directional Weight Decay in Null-Space
per_result_scores.rationale: Decays weights directionally toward null-space-orthogonal direction while preserving task subspace — operationally identical to osmotic pull of weight magnitude out of null-space. Calibration band 0.85-0.95.

per_result_scores.title: Concentration-Style Magnitude Pruning of LoRA
per_result_scores.rationale: Explicitly concentrates weight magnitude in task subspace by penalizing null-space norm; identical 'concentration / dehydration of null-space' framing minus the osmotic metaphor. Calibration band ~0.85.

per_result_scores.title: Osmosis-Inspired Adaptive Pruning of LLMs
per_result_scores.rationale: Osmosis-inspired gradient-driven weight-magnitude removal from null-space — near-verbatim match to OSMO-NULL-PRUNE in both metaphor and mechanism. Direct prior art. Calibration band 0.9-0.95.

verdict_rationale: Six of eight results hit the threshold, including rank 8 (Osmosis-Inspired Adaptive Pruning) which matches the candidate near-verbatim — osmosis metaphor + weight-magnitude removal from null-space. Ranks 6 and 7 independently cover the directional null-space weight decay and concentration-style magnitude pruning sub-claims. The candidate's own novelty_claim concedes that null-space-aware regularization is already published; the search confirms even the specific osmotic framing is taken. Re-judgement: prior art is direct and dense, not adjacent.
